words.hint: Pewnego ranka obudziłem się bardzo wcześnie.
words.answer: One morning I woke up very early.
The sun was shining outside the window.

words.hint: Poczułem, że to będzie niezwykły dzień.
words.answer: I felt it would be an unusual day.
I ate a quick breakfast.
I heard meowing at the door.
I opened the door and saw a cat.

words.hint: Kot miał białą łatkę na ogonie.
words.answer: The cat had a white spot on its tail.
He was very friendly.
He scratched behind his ear with his paw.
He looked at me with big eyes.
I decided to feed him.
I had some milk at home.
I poured the milk into a bowl.
The cat drank the milk very quickly.
He looked satisfied.
Suddenly, he jumped onto the windowsill.
He looked around.
He purred quietly.
I looked at my watch.
It was still early.
I decided to go for a walk.
The cat decided to go with me.
We walked through the park together.
We met a dog on a leash.
The dog barked in a friendly way.
The cat didn’t run away, he just meowed.
An elderly man was sitting on a bench.

words.hint: Starszy pan uśmiechnął się do mnie.
words.answer: The elderly man smiled at me.
He asked if the cat was mine.
I answered that I wasn’t sure.

words.hint: Kot usiadł na ławce obok pana.
words.answer: The cat sat on the bench next to the man.
They looked like old friends.
The man took a treat from his pocket.
The cat ate the treat with pleasure.
I looked at the trees in the park.
Birds were singing high up in the branches.
Daisies were growing in the grass.
I stopped by the fountain.
The cat jumped onto the edge of the fountain.
Leaves were floating on the water.
Suddenly, the cat sneezed loudly.
I laughed at the sneeze.
Passersby looked at us in surprise.
The cat looked at me offended.
I patted him apologetically.
He calmed down and purred.
We sat on the bench together.
I told the cat about my plans.
The cat pretended to listen.
The sun began to set.
The cat jumped off the bench.

words.hint: Spojrzał na mnie po raz ostatni.
words.answer: He looked at me one last time.

words.hint: Machnął ogonem i pobiegł w krzaki.
words.answer: He swished his tail and ran into the bushes.
I felt a little sad.
But I knew he would come back.
I returned home with a smile.
It was truly an unusual day.

words.hint: Zrozumiałem, że czasem przyjaźń przychodzi niespodziewanie.
words.answer: I realized that sometimes friendship comes unexpectedly.

words.hint: Czasami kot wybiera człowieka, a nie odwrotnie.
words.answer: Sometimes, a cat chooses a person, not the other way around.
